flashcards.back: Word to Vector - a technique for learning distributed representations of words from text.

flashcards.front: What are the two main architectures in Word2Vec?
flashcards.back: Continuous Bag of Words (CBOW) and Skip-Gram Model.
The linguistic theory that words that appear in similar contexts tend to have similar meanings.
An optimization technique that approximates the softmax function by sampling negative examples instead of computing over the entire vocabulary.
